description_long: This object is a dark gray, cylindrical mailbox mounted on a vertical post, featuring a red flag on its side. The mailbox has a rounded top and flat sides, with the word 'MAIL' embossed on both lateral faces. The front face displays a decorative fleur-de-lis symbol, while the rear is plain. The red flag is attached to the right side and can be raised or lowered, indicating mail status. The post is a simple, straight, dark-colored shaft supporting the mailbox above ground level. The overall design is utilitarian and typical for suburban or urban roadside mailboxes.
description: A dark gray, cylindrical mailbox with a red flag, mounted on a straight post and featuring a fleur-de-lis on the front.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the plain, rounded back of the mailbox and the supporting post beneath.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the 'MAIL' text and the red flag in the raised position.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the fleur-de-lis symbol on the mailbox door and the post below.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the 'MAIL' text and the red flag, now on the left side of the mailbox.
attribute_brand_logo: A fleur-de-lis symbol is visible on the front face; 'MAIL' text is embossed on both sides.
